name: Linkup Python MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Python MCP server from Linkup Platform — a real-time web search and content retrieval API designed for AI agents. Enables agents to search the web, retrieve up-to-date content, and ground responses with current information. Linkup focuses on providing clean, agent-friendly search results optimized for AI consumption.
use_cases: Real-time web search for AI agents needing current information beyond training data
Grounding LLM responses with up-to-date web content via search
Retrieving specific web content for research and analysis agents
Building RAG pipelines with live web content rather than static knowledge bases
not_for: Teams with sufficient static knowledge bases that don't need real-time web data
Applications where web search adds latency unacceptable for UX
Very high-volume search applications without appropriate Linkup plan
best_when: An AI agent needs access to current, real-time web information for accurate grounding — Linkup is specifically designed for AI agent search use cases with clean, structured results.
avoid_when: Your knowledge base covers the domain adequately. Web search adds cost and latency — use it when freshness and coverage breadth are required.

auth.notes: Linkup API key required. Set LINKUP_API_KEY environment variable. Register at linkup.so.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free credits on signup for testing
pricing.notes: Usage-based pricing from Linkup Platform. Official Python MCP from LinkupPlatform org.

known_agent_gotchas: Search costs accumulate in agent loops — implement caching and deduplication
Linkup is an emerging platform — API may evolve as they grow
Search result quality and coverage compared to established providers should be validated
Official from LinkupPlatform org — dedicated team improving AI-specific search
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS to Linkup API. API key authentication. Search queries and results transmitted to Linkup servers. Avoid PII in search queries. GDPR compliant.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS to Linkup cloud. API key required. Search queries logged. GDPR compliant.
